final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire D,        // Data input
    input wire unused_WE,       // Write enable
    output reg Q         // Data output
);
    always @(unused_WE or D) begin
        if (unused_WE) begin
            Q <= D;     // Write data to Q when unused_WE is high
        end
        // If unused_WE is low, we retain the previous value of Q
    end
endmodule
